body: We're sorry but app-master doesn't work properly without JavaScript enabled. Please enable it to continue.建模系统管控单元建模采集设备建模工作流建模数字孪生建模分组 导入 导出 删除 根组集成测试测试引滦工程mwq测试张测试组lk测试盛云_孙宇飞_根组模型列表 新建 更多操作 序号名称描述操作1盛云_孙宇飞_Smoke模型_0518建模系统客户端冒烟测试模型；父分组：盛云_孙宇飞_根组；用于验证新建、提交、生成拷贝链路。 编辑 属性 提交版本 版本管理 更新 删除共 1 条50条/页100条/页150条/页200条/页250条/页300条/页<1>前往页 #RContainerk6a038a324005492e8f16e7f238c6e9c #k8f80717350dd77394bbec504122c6da { box-shadow: 0px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,1); }#RContainerk6a038a324005492e8f16e7f238c6e9c { height: 899px; width: 1920px; border: 0px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-radius:0px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 1); background-image: ; background-repeat: repeat; background-size: auto; box-shadow:0px 0px 0px 0px rgba(0,0,0,1) }#RContainerkfa825f8bbc18015220e01a0f38250c2 #k634771653cdb5f6f6b4a28dbe7f8795 { background:#FFFFFF; border-width:0px; border-style:null; border-color:#000000; text-align:left; align-items:center; } #RContainerkfa825f8bbc18015220e01a0f38250c2 #k634771653cdb5f6f6b4a28dbe7f8795 p{ font-family:Arial; font-size:14px; } #RContainerkfa825f8bbc18015220e01a0f38250c2 #k634771653cdb5f6f6b4a28dbe7f8795 label{ font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; padding-right: 0px; text-decoration:none; }#RContainerkfa825f8bbc18015220e01a0f38250c2 #k634771653cdb5f6f6b4a28dbe7f8795 p { color: #333333; } /*自定义按钮边距*/ body #RContainerkfa825f8bbc18015220e01a0f38250c2 #k932b9dffd2df3b810aaee7f7c04d659 .el-tree-node__content .nodeButtonBox { position: absolute; right: 0; } /*树节点的文本字体大小*/ body #RContainerkfa825f8bbc18015220e01a0f38250c2 #k932b9dffd2df3b810aaee7f7c04d659 .el-tree-node__content{ font-size: 14px;} /*树节点的高度、背景色*/ body #RContainerkfa825f8bbc18015220e01a0f38250c2 #k932b9dffd2df3b810aaee7f7c04d659 .el-tree-node__content{ height: 32px;} body #RContainerkfa825f8bbc18015220e01a0f38250c2 #k932b9dffd2df3b810aaee7f7c04d659 .treeicon1 { background-image: url("data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABgAAAA
